entries.definition:
كتاب الغين

غضن - غضر

(غطش) الغين والطاء والشين أصلٌ واحدٌ صحيح، يدلُّ على ظُلْمَةٍ

gh–ṭ–sh weak eye sight; (of night) to be dark, to cause to be
dark; to be difficult; to travel through the land. Of this root, only
أَغْطَش aghṭasha occurs once in the Qur’an.

أَغْطَش aghṭasha [v. IV trans.] to make dark (79:29) وَأَغْطَشَ لَيْلَهَا
وَأَخْرَجَ ضُحَاهَا giving darkness to its night and bringing out its
morning brightness.
